title: ACOP Error Response Schema
description: Normative shape for error response bodies in the ACOP HTTP+JSON binding.

code.description: An ACOP error code. MUST be either a reserved core code or a vendor-prefixed extension code matching '^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*(\.[a-z][a-z0-9_]*)*$'.

message.description: Human-readable explanation. MUST NOT contain secrets.

retry_after_seconds.description: When set, clients SHOULD wait at least this many seconds before retrying. MUST agree with the HTTP Retry-After header when both are present.

details.description: Code-specific structured context. Shape varies per code.

reserved_core_codes.description: Informational enumeration of the reserved ACOP core error codes (see acop-http-binding.md § error code vocabulary). Not used as a schema constraint because vendor-prefixed extension codes are also valid.
